meta.description: Mock derivation examples for AI Agent reference

derivation_patterns.description: 取最早的日期，通常用于首次事件日期

example.transformation_sql: SELECT usubjid, MIN(exstdtc) AS trtsdt FROM bronze.ex WHERE exoccur='Y' GROUP BY usubjid
example.label: First Treatment Date

derivation_patterns.template: SELECT usubjid, MIN({date_column}) AS {target_var} FROM {source_table} WHERE {condition} GROUP BY usubjid

example.transformation_sql: CASE WHEN trtsdt IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
example.label: Safety Population Flag

derivation_patterns.template: CASE WHEN {condition} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS {target_var}

example.transformation_sql: SELECT *, FIRST_VALUE(aval) OVER (PARTITION BY usubjid, paramcd ORDER BY visitnum) AS base, aval - base AS chg FROM bronze.lb
example.label: Baseline and Change from Baseline

derivation_patterns.template: SELECT *, FIRST_VALUE({value_column}) OVER (PARTITION BY usubjid, paramcd ORDER BY {visit_order}) AS base, {value_column} - base AS chg FROM {source_table}

example.transformation_sql: SELECT usubjid, aval AS bl_phga FROM bronze.efficacy WHERE paramcd='PHGA' AND ablfl='Y'
example.label: Baseline PhGA Score

derivation_patterns.template: SELECT usubjid, {value_column} AS {target_var} FROM {source_table} WHERE {param_filter} AND {baseline_flag}='Y'

example.label: MMT-8 Total Score
example.description: Sum of 8 muscle strength items, with missing value handling - see rule doc

derivation_patterns.note: 复杂评分需要Rule Document详细说明缺失值处理、有效性规则等

derivation_patterns.description: 治疗期不良事件flag（日期范围判断）

example.transformation_sql: CASE WHEN aestdtc >= trtsdt AND aestdtc <= trtedt + INTERVAL '28 days' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
example.label: Treatment-Emergent AE Flag

derivation_patterns.template: CASE WHEN {event_date} >= {trt_start} AND {event_date} <= {trt_end} + INTERVAL '{offset} days' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS {target_var}

example.transformation_sql: CASE WHEN age < 18 THEN '<18' WHEN age < 65 THEN '18-64' ELSE '>=65' END
example.label: Age Group

derivation_patterns.template: CASE WHEN {numeric_var} < {cutoff1} THEN '{label1}' WHEN {numeric_var} < {cutoff2} THEN '{label2}' ELSE '{label3}' END AS {target_var}

usage_guidance.for_agent: Agent应该根据target_var和depends_on识别适用的pattern，然后套用template生成SQL
usage_guidance.for_human: 人类应该先选择pattern，填写variables，然后让Agent生成完整SQL

complexity_guide.simple: Agent可直接生成，无需人工审核
complexity_guide.complex: 需要Rule Document，Agent读取规则后生成
